quick_prompts.symptoms: I've been feeling some symptoms and need help figuring out what's going on
quick_prompts.medication: Can you help me understand my current medications and their side effects?
quick_prompts.mental: I've been feeling anxious and stressed lately. Can we talk about it?
quick_prompts.heart: I want to understand my heart health better
quick_prompts.fever: I have a fever and cold symptoms. What should I do?

concern_prompts.headache: I've been having headaches. Can you help me understand possible causes?
concern_prompts.eye_pain: My eyes have been hurting. What could be causing this?
concern_prompts.stomach: I'm experiencing stomach problems. Can you help?
concern_prompts.heart: I've been having chest pain or heart-related concerns.
concern_prompts.joint_pain: My joints have been aching. What should I know?
concern_prompts.ear_pain: I'm having ear pain. What could be wrong?
concern_prompts.breathing: I've been having trouble breathing. Can you help?
concern_prompts.fever: I've had a fever. What should I do?
concern_prompts.nutrition: I need nutrition and diet advice for better health.
concern_prompts.immunity: I want to boost my immunity. What do you suggest?

home.hydration_desc: Drinking enough water daily helps maintain energy levels, supports digestion, and keeps your skin healthy.
home.activity_desc: Regular physical activity boosts mood, strengthens your heart, and helps maintain a healthy weight.

profile.data_sharing_desc: Control who can access your health data
profile.download_export_desc: Export everything MediQ holds about you (PDF)
profile.delete_full_desc: Permanently deletes your account and data
profile.report_alerts_desc: When a new health report is ready
profile.consent_ai_desc: I consent to my medical images being processed by MediQ's AI screening system
profile.consent_data_desc: I consent to my health data being stored securely on MediQ's servers
profile.consent_referral_desc: I consent to being notified when my doctor initiates a specialist referral
profile.delete_confirm_desc: This action is permanent. To confirm, type DELETE.
profile.update_failed: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy Center
privacy.subtitle: Your data rights and controls
privacy.retention_desc: Choose how long MediQ keeps your records
privacy.audit_desc: View your consent history, referral updates, exports, and account actions
privacy.right_access: Right to access your health data
privacy.right_erasure: Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)
privacy.confirm_deletion_desc: This action cannot be undone. Type DELETE to confirm.
privacy.export_success: Your data export has been downloaded.

chat.mira_intro: Your AI health companion. I can help you understand symptoms, provide health information, and guide you to appropriate care.
chat.error_processing: I'm having trouble processing that. Please try again.
chat.error_connection: I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please check your internet connection and try again.
chat.location_disabled: Location disabled. Enable it to see nearby hospitals.
chat.location_prompt: To find nearby hospitals, I need access to your location. Would you like to enable location services?

scan.upload_desc: Upload your medical scan for AI analysis
scan.analyzing_desc: Our AI is examining your medical image
scan.analysis_success: Your scan has been analyzed successfully
scan.analysis_error: Failed to analyze scan. Please try again.
scan.doctor_review_desc: A doctor will review your scan results
scan.drag_drop: Drag and drop or click to browse
scan.supports_formats: Supports X-ray, MRI, CT scans, and dermoscopic images

scan_result.disclaimer: This is an AI-generated preliminary assessment. Please consult a qualified healthcare professional for diagnosis and treatment.

reports.title: Health Records
reports.description: X-ray analyses in Timeline. Screening reports and skin scans in Reports
reports.timeline_info: Timeline shows: X-ray scan analyses and diagnostic imaging only
reports.reports_info: Reports shows: AI screening reports and skin scan analyses only
reports.complete_screening: Complete an AI screening chat to generate a report.
reports.doctor_notes_info: Doctors will add important observations and notes during your consultations
reports.about_doctor_notes_desc: These are observations, warnings, and important notes added by doctors during your consultations. Pay special attention to warnings and allergy notes.
reports.download_error: Unable to download report. Please try again.
reports.enable_location: Enable location to find nearby hospitals.
reports.nearby_hospitals_desc: Nearby facilities based on your current location.
reports.no_hospitals: No nearby hospitals found. Try increasing search radius.
reports.safety_urgent: Seek urgent care if you experience severe or rapidly worsening symptoms.
reports.safety_monitor: Follow prescribed guidance, keep medications accessible, and monitor symptom changes daily.
reports.disclaimer_text: This report is generated by an AI system and should not be used as a definitive diagnosis. Please consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical advice.
reports.consult_professional: Consult a qualified healthcare professional for diagnosis and treatment.
reports.track_symptoms: Track your symptoms and seek urgent care if they worsen.

onboarding.setup_desc: Let's set up your health information to personalize your experience

trust.title: Trust Center
trust.subtitle: How MediQ protects your health data
trust.encryption_desc: All data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3.
trust.access_control_desc: Role-based access ensures only authorized doctors and specialists can view your data.
trust.audit_logs_desc: Every access to your health records is logged and available for your review.
trust.compliance_badge: Certified compliant with Digital Information Security in Healthcare Act (DISHA)

grievance.title: Grievance Portal
grievance.subtitle: Report concerns about your data or care
grievance.unauthorized_desc: Someone accessed your data without permission
grievance.consent_desc: Your consent preferences were not respected
grievance.submitted_desc: We will investigate and respond within 7 working days as per DISHA guidelines.
grievance.error_min_chars: Please provide at least 10 characters describing your concern

chat_sidebar.title: Chat History
chat_sidebar.subtitle: Your conversations with Mira
chat_sidebar.start_new: Start a new conversation with Mira
chat_sidebar.private_secure: Your conversations are private and secure

report_prompt.generated_desc: Your preliminary medical screening report has been created based on our conversation.
report_prompt.disclaimer: This is an AI-generated preliminary report. It is not a diagnosis. Please consult a healthcare professional.
report_prompt.generate_desc: Based on our conversation, I can create a preliminary medical report summarizing your symptoms and potential conditions.
report_prompt.important_disclaimer: Important Disclaimer: This report is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice.
report_prompt.saved_info: Your report will be saved and accessible from the Reports section.

hospital_prompt.attention_desc: Based on your symptoms, it may be beneficial to visit a healthcare facility for proper evaluation.
hospital_prompt.location_desc: Please enable location access to find nearby hospitals.
hospital_prompt.error_fetch: Failed to fetch nearby hospitals. Please try again.

hospital_rec.tip: Visit the nearest facility for prompt medical evaluation

location_dialog.title: Enable Location Access
location_dialog.description: To find nearby hospitals and healthcare facilities, MediQ needs access to your location.
location_dialog.privacy_note: Your location is only used while searching and is not stored.

error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.description: The app hit a runtime error. This is not your fault.

doctor_login.title: Doctor Portal
doctor_login.subtitle: Sign in to your medical practice dashboard
doctor_login.error_not_doctor: This account is not registered as a medical professional. Please use Patient Sign In.

doctor_dashboard.search_placeholder: Search screenings by patient name or Health ID...

doctor_reviews.title: Screening Reviews
doctor_reviews.subtitle: Screening cases
doctor_reviews.description: Review recent screenings and add remarks

doctor_review_detail.title: Case Detail
doctor_review_detail.gradcam_desc: The Grad-CAM visualization highlights areas of the scan that the AI model focused on when making its prediction. Red/yellow areas indicate high activation (areas of concern), while blue/green areas indicate low activation.

doctor_patient.title: Patient Profile
doctor_patient.timeline_desc: Medical history, scans, and visit records
doctor_patient.tap_doctor: Tap a doctor to prefill the referral search

doctor_referrals.title: My Referrals
doctor_referrals.description: Track all referrals you've sent to specialists
doctor_referrals.empty_desc: Referrals you send to specialists will appear here
doctor_referrals.pending_msg: Waiting for specialist to accept this referral
doctor_referrals.declined_msg: This referral was declined by the specialist

doctor_appointments.no_requests_desc: When patients book your available slots, requests will appear here
doctor_appointments.no_slots_desc: Add your available time slots for patients to book

specialist_inbox.title: Referral Inbox
specialist_inbox.empty_desc: You have no referrals assigned to you right now.

book_appointment.search_placeholder: Search doctors by name or specialty...
book_appointment.no_appointments_desc: Browse doctors and book your first appointment

welcome.hero_desc: MediQ uses clinically validated AI models to detect early signs of disease from medical scans and symptom analysis — with full transparency and doctor oversight.
welcome.compliance_desc: Every AI prediction is explainable. Every data access is logged. MediQ follows DISHA and DPDP Act 2023 standards for responsible health AI.

about.title: Why MediQ?
about.subtitle: Early health screening. Clear answers. Smarter care.
about.description: MediQ combines AI-driven screening with full clinical transparency — giving patients and doctors the tools they need for early detection and informed decisions.
about.ai_intelligence_desc: Advanced CNN models analyze medical scans with clinically validated accuracy
about.transparency_desc: Grad-CAM heatmaps show exactly what the AI detected and why
about.health_records_desc: All reports, scans, and doctor notes in one secure location

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need for smarter healthcare.
features.ai_chat_desc: Real-time symptom analysis with NLP-powered health assessment and automatic report generation
features.smart_report_desc: Auto-generated health reports from chat conversations with severity classification and care plans
features.scan_analysis_desc: Deep learning analysis of X-rays and skin images with Grad-CAM visual explanations
features.doctor_dash_desc: Comprehensive review interface for screening results, patient follow-ups, and clinical notes
features.referral_network_desc: Seamless referral routing with priority classification and specialist matching
features.hospital_nav_desc: GPS-based hospital finder with distance calculation and emergency facility detection

doctor_portal_section.title: Doctor Portal
doctor_portal_section.subtitle: Designed for healthcare professionals.
doctor_portal_section.description: A dedicated workspace for doctors to review AI screening results, add clinical notes, flag follow-ups, and refer patients to specialists — all from one dashboard.

tech.title: Technology
tech.subtitle: Built on modern, reliable infrastructure.
tech.backend_desc: FastAPI + Python for high-performance API endpoints with async support
tech.ai_models_desc: TensorFlow/Keras CNNs trained on validated medical imaging datasets
tech.database_desc: Supabase PostgreSQL with row-level security and encrypted storage
tech.deployment_desc: Docker-ready architecture with CI/CD pipeline support

referral_panel.title: Referral
referral_panel.subtitle: Refer this patient to a specialist
referral_panel.search_placeholder: Search by name, specialty, or hospital...
referral_panel.select_scan_msg: Select a scan above to begin a referral.
referral_panel.error_specialist: Please select or add a specialist
